heading: Persons authorized to serve search warrant
label: 3105 Persons authorized to serve search warrant
text: A search warrant may in all cases be served by any of the officers mentioned in its direction or by an officer authorized by law to serve such warrant, but by no other person, except in aid of the officer on his requiring it, he being present and acting in its execution.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 617 (, title XI, § 7, ).June 15, 1917, ch. 3040 Stat. 229Minor change was made in phraseology.
